sourceSummary.oneLine: Configuration file identifying all file format writers available to Bio-Formats and the order in which they should be used.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Lists Bio-Formats writer classes and associated file extensions; no regulatory approval, authority, or jurisdictional use is stated.
keyPoints: The file identifies available Bio-Formats file format writers.
The file specifies the order in which writers should be used.
Listed writer outputs include OME, OME-TIFF, TIFF, JPEG, JPEG 2000, PNG, AVI, QuickTime MOV, EPS, ICS, and Java.

concepts.name: Bio-Formats file format writers
concepts.evidence: This document is a configuration file identifying all file format writers available to Bio-Formats

concepts.name: Writer usage order
concepts.evidence: and the order in which they should be used

evidence.claim: The document is a configuration file for Bio-Formats file format writers.
evidence.evidenceText: This document is a configuration file identifying all file format writers available to Bio-Formats

evidence.claim: The configuration file defines the order in which Bio-Formats writers should be used.
evidence.evidenceText: and the order in which they should be used

evidence.claim: The OME-TIFF writer is associated with ome.tif and ome.tiff extensions.
The TIFF writer is associated with tif and tiff extensions.
The JPEG writer is associated with jpg and jpeg extensions.
